message:
fix: use port 3307 consistently for Dolt server connections (bd-ig3re)

The Gas Town default Dolt port is 3307 (to avoid conflict with MySQL on 3306),
but multiple locations hardcoded 3306 or fell back to it. This caused migration
to connect on 3306 while runtime used 3307.

Changes:
- Change DefaultSQLPort from 3306 to 3307 in dolt/server.go
- Write DoltServerPort to metadata.json during migration
- Remove redundant 3306 fallback in doctor/dolt.go (GetDoltServerPort handles it)
- Use config-based port in doctor/perf_dolt.go instead of hardcoded 3306
- Fix flag help text in init.go to say 3307
- Fix federation port defaults in daemon.go, daemon_start.go, daemon_lifecycle.go

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/obsidian
Rig: beads
Role: polecats

files.patch:
@@ -276,7 +276,7 @@ func init() {
 	daemonCmd.Flags().String("log-level", "info", "Log level (debug, info, warn, error)")
 	daemonCmd.Flags().Bool("log-json", false, "Output logs in JSON format (structured logging)")
 	daemonCmd.Flags().Bool("federation", false, "Enable federation mode (runs dolt sql-server with remotesapi)")
-	daemonCmd.Flags().Int("federation-port", 3306, "MySQL port for federation mode dolt sql-server")
+	daemonCmd.Flags().Int("federation-port", 3307, "MySQL port for federation mode dolt sql-server")
 	daemonCmd.Flags().Int("remotesapi-port", 8080, "remotesapi port for peer-to-peer sync in federation mode")
 	daemonCmd.Flags().BoolVar(&jsonOutput, "json", false, "Output JSON format")
 	rootCmd.AddCommand(daemonCmd)

@@ -176,6 +176,6 @@ func init() {
 	daemonStartCmd.Flags().String("log-level", "info", "Log level (debug, info, warn, error)")
 	daemonStartCmd.Flags().Bool("log-json", false, "Output logs in JSON format")
 	daemonStartCmd.Flags().Bool("federation", false, "Enable federation mode (runs dolt sql-server)")
-	daemonStartCmd.Flags().Int("federation-port", 3306, "MySQL port for federation mode dolt sql-server")
+	daemonStartCmd.Flags().Int("federation-port", 3307, "MySQL port for federation mode dolt sql-server")
 	daemonStartCmd.Flags().Int("remotesapi-port", 8080, "remotesapi port for peer-to-peer sync in federation mode")
 }

@@ -745,7 +745,7 @@ func init() {
 	// Dolt server mode flags
 	initCmd.Flags().Bool("server", false, "Configure Dolt server connection settings (server mode is always used)")
 	initCmd.Flags().String("server-host", "", "Dolt server host (default: 127.0.0.1)")
-	initCmd.Flags().Int("server-port", 0, "Dolt server port (default: 3306)")
+	initCmd.Flags().Int("server-port", 0, "Dolt server port (default: 3307)")
 	initCmd.Flags().String("server-user", "", "Dolt server MySQL user (default: root)")
 
 	rootCmd.AddCommand(initCmd)
